title: Death 2I Chronology
wikitext:
[]: Death 2I Chronology             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Oct 15, 2006 7:34 am Just noting this in passing on the off chance it hasn't come up already. While reviewing Death and Rebirth, I noticed that during the second impact flashback at the very beginning everything seems to be in chronological order. However, before Adam explodes, we are shown an orbital shot of Antarctica as the familiar red wasteland. Here's an image with the shots in the order they appeared onscreen. [URL=http://img137.imageshack.us/my.php?image=death2isequenceme5.jpg] [/URL] The red wasteland shot appears after the emerging Adam camera shots, but before Adam explodes, as we see him in during the Katsurugi sequence. Is this supposed to be the case? Submitted for your approval.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Oct 15, 2006 11:42 am I think that is supposed to be the case. The Adam spreading wings shot looks reddish in the background, similar to the previous orbital shot of Antarctica's region turning red. The actual explosion that knocked the Earth off its axis happens after all that. I'd attribute the redness to something "adam-based ecosystem" something

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Oct 16, 2006 1:59 am Ornette wrote: I'd attribute the redness to something "adam-based ecosystem" something

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Oct 16, 2006 6:16 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Ornette wrote: I'd attribute the redness to something "adam-based ecosystem" something

Article: Death 2I Chronology
[]: Death 2I Chronology             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Oct 15, 2006 7:34 am Just noting this in passing on the off chance it hasn't come up already. While reviewing Death and Rebirth, I noticed that during the second impact flashback at the very beginning everything seems to be in chronological order. However, before Adam explodes, we are shown an orbital shot of Antarctica as the familiar red wasteland. Here's an image with the shots in the order they appeared onscreen. [URL=http://img137.imageshack.us/my.php?image=death2isequenceme5.jpg] [/URL] The red wasteland shot appears after the emerging Adam camera shots, but before Adam explodes, as we see him in during the Katsurugi sequence. Is this supposed to be the case? Submitted for your approval.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Oct 15, 2006 11:42 am I think that is supposed to be the case. The Adam spreading wings shot looks reddish in the background, similar to the previous orbital shot of Antarctica's region turning red. The actual explosion that knocked the Earth off its axis happens after all that. I'd attribute the redness to something "adam-based ecosystem" something

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Oct 16, 2006 1:59 am Ornette wrote: I'd attribute the redness to something "adam-based ecosystem" something
